user.title: Amazon Account
user.description:
Configure your Amazon account for Alexa Shopping List sync.

**Important:** Only accounts with 2-Step Verification via Authenticator App are supported. No Passkeys, no SMS OTP.

data_description.otp_secret: The 52-character secret key from your authenticator app setup. NOT the 6-digit code.
data_description.ha_url: Internal URL of your Home Assistant instance
data_description.public_url: Only needed if HA is not directly accessible

proxy_login.title: Amazon Login
proxy_login.description:
Please complete the login in the browser window that opened. The OTP code will be filled automatically.

[Open Login Page]({proxy_url})

select_target.title: Target List
select_target.description: Choose the list that Alexa items will be synced with.

data_description.target_list: The built-in Shopping List or any to-do list entity

data_description.initial_sync_mode: How to handle existing items on first sync
data_description.poll_interval: How often to check for changes (30-600 seconds)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Amazon session has expired. Please re-authenticate.

error.login_failed: Login failed - check email and password
error.passkey_not_supported: Passkey login detected - only Authenticator App 2SV is supported
error.unsupported_login_flow: Amazon entered an unsupported login flow
error.shopping_list_missing: Home Assistant Shopping List integration not found. Please enable it first.
error.amazon_list_id_not_found: Could not find Alexa shopping list
error.throttled: Amazon rate limit hit - please wait and try again

abort.already_configured: This Amazon account is already configured
abort.no_target_list_available: No target list available. Please set up the Shopping List integration or a to-do list integration first.

data_description.target_list: Changing the target list will clear all item mappings and trigger a full resync.

reauth_needed.title: Alexa Shopping Sync: Re-authentication required
reauth_needed.description: Your Amazon session has expired. Please re-authenticate via the integration settings.

shopping_list_missing.title: Alexa Shopping Sync: Shopping List not found
shopping_list_missing.description: The Home Assistant Shopping List integration is not configured. Please add it for sync to work.

passkey_detected.title: Alexa Shopping Sync: Passkey login not supported
passkey_detected.description: Amazon is requiring a Passkey for login. This integration only supports Authenticator App 2SV. Please disable Passkeys in your Amazon account settings.

unsupported_login_flow.title: Alexa Shopping Sync: Unsupported login flow
unsupported_login_flow.description: Amazon entered an unsupported login flow. Please check your account settings and try again.

repeated_auth_failure.title: Alexa Shopping Sync: Repeated authentication failures
repeated_auth_failure.description: Multiple authentication failures detected (HTTP 401/403). Please re-authenticate.

rate_limited.title: Alexa Shopping Sync: Rate limited by Amazon
rate_limited.description: Amazon is rate-limiting requests (HTTP 429). The integration will automatically retry with backoff.

full_resync.name: Full Resync
full_resync.description: Clear mappings and perform a full resync

clear_local_mapping.name: Clear Local Mapping
clear_local_mapping.description: Clear the local item mapping store

export_sanitized_diagnostics.name: Export Sanitized Diagnostics
export_sanitized_diagnostics.description: Export diagnostics data with all secrets removed
